prompt:
I pulled two vendor invoices out of my inbox — can you build an invoice master row for each and then the journal entries? Here they are:

--- Email 1 ---
From: noreply@dewa.gov.ae
Subject: Your DEWA Tax Invoice is ready
Tax Invoice No: 700114882
Billing Period: 01 May 2026 - 31 May 2026
Premise No: 2049913 (Marina Gate Tower 1, Apt 1203)
Consumption charges: AED 900.00
Municipality housing fee: AED 45.00
VAT (5%): AED 47.25
Total due: AED 992.25

--- Email 2 ---
From: accounts@sparkleclean.ae
Subject: Invoice SC-2207 - Cleaning services
Invoice SC-2207, dated 25/05/2026
Deep clean + turnover, Apt 1203 Marina Gate
Amount: AED 400.00
VAT 5%: AED 20.00
Total: AED 420.00

For context: Apt 1203 Marina Gate (premise 2049913) is our rev-share unit A-1203, owner Khan.

assertions.text: Invoice master has a row for each invoice (DEWA 700114882 and SparkleClean SC-2207)
Premise 2049913 is mapped to unit A-1203
DEWA recoverable cost debits Landlord Receivable — Utilities (120060)
Cleaning is Silkhaus-borne to Unit Cleaning Expenses (620013)
Splits 5% Input VAT (110038) and credits Accounts Payable (110001)
Uses only real Silkhaus GL codes (no invented placeholders)
DEWA is booked as ONE entry (consumption + municipality combined), not split into duplicate sub-entries with repeated flags
